div.h3: Performance validation methodology for io_uring optimization suites

g.text: 2. Performance Transition: Baseline vs. Optimized State
func OpenCounter(cpu int, counterType uint32) (int, error) {
func MeasureOperation(fd int, payload func()) uint64 {

div.p: Uses hardware/software counters. Zero-copy kernel-to-user reporting.
Intercepts every transition between User Space and Kernel Space.

text.tspan: # Capture summary statistics for specific ops
# Capture summary statistics for specific ops

ul.li: [x] Thermal Throttling: CPU pinned to Max Freq
[x] Isolation: cgroups/cpuset used for worker threads
[x] Sample Size: Mean of 20 runs, SD < 5%
[x] Observability: Concurrent mpstat 1 to monitor SI/HI

div.p: sizeof=120 bytes. Alignment must be 8-byte boundary.

ul.li:
Flow:
Loop start -> epoll_wait
recv() -> user buffer
process() -> user logic
send() -> kernel socket
Shared Rings: SQ/CQ in Mapped Memory

Optimization Flags:
IORING_SETUP_SQPOLL (Kernel Thread)
IORING_REGISTER_FILES (Fixed fds)
IORING_SETUP_IOPOLL (Busy Wait)
